quiz.title: Section 1
quiz.source_file: Example Resources\SSC Stenographer Grade C&D\5. TEST SERIES-10\Section 1.docx

questions.question_text: Which Indian state recently became the first to launch an exclusive "AI-Powered Climate Risk Map" for its coastal districts in 2026?
The 'Gaganyaan-3' mission, which saw a major milestone in early 2026, is India's project to:
questions.options: {"A": "Land a rover on the South Pole of the Moon", "B": "Send a manned mission to the International Space Station", "C": "Send Indian astronauts into a Low Earth Orbit", "D": "Study the atmosphere of Venus"}

options_raw.label: A
options_raw.text: Land a rover on the South Pole of the Moon

options_raw.label: B
options_raw.text: Send a manned mission to the International Space Station

options_raw.label: C
options_raw.text: Send Indian astronauts into a Low Earth Orbit

questions.question_text: Who was recently appointed as the 'President of the World Bank' for a term starting in late 2025?
The 'PM-FME' scheme, frequently in the news in 2026, is related to the formalization of:
questions.options: {"A": "Micro Food Processing Enterprises", "B": "Textile Manufacturing Units", "C": "Rural Medical Clinics", "D": "Digital Payment Gateways"}

questions.question_text: What is the main objective of 'Open Market Operations' (OMO) conducted by the RBI?
questions.options: {"A": "Regulate the export of gold", "B": "Control the liquidity in the economy", "C": "Fix the exchange rate of the Rupee", "D": "Provide loans to farmers"}

options_raw.label: B
options_raw.text: Control the liquidity in the economy

options_raw.label: C
options_raw.text: Fix the exchange rate of the Rupee

questions.question_text: The 'World Development Report' is an annual publication of:
Which type of curve represents the relationship between 'Inflation' and 'Unemployment'?
The 'Gig Economy' primarily refers to a labor market characterized by:
questions.options: {"A": "Lifetime government employment", "B": "Short-term contracts or freelance work", "C": "Heavy industrial manufacturing", "D": "Agricultural cooperatives"}

questions.question_text: Which Indian city is known as the 'Silicon Valley of India'?
The 'FDI' limit in the 'Defense Sector' under the automatic route in India is currently:
Which of the following is the 'Lightest Metal' known?
'Goitre' is a medical condition caused by the deficiency of which mineral?
What is the SI unit of 'Frequency'?
The 'Newton’s Third Law of Motion' is best described as:
questions.options: {"A": "Law of Inertia", "B": "F=ma", "C": "Action and Reaction are equal and opposite", "D": "Universal Law of Gravitation"}

options_raw.label: C
options_raw.text: Action and Reaction are equal and opposite

questions.question_text: What is the chemical name of 'Plaster of Paris'?
Which part of the human brain is responsible for 'Memory' and 'Intelligence'?
'Bronze' is an alloy of which two metals?
questions.options: {"A": "Copper and Zinc", "B": "Copper and Tin", "C": "Iron and Nickel", "D": "Lead and Tin"}

questions.question_text: What is the average 'Lifespan of a Human Red Blood Cell' (RBC)?
Which gas is used in 'Neon Signs' for a bright reddish-orange glow?
'Ophthalmology' is the branch of medicine that deals with:
questions.options: {"A": "Skin diseases", "B": "Heart conditions", "C": "Eye disorders", "D": "Bone health Section 3: History"}

questions.question_text: Who was the founder of the 'Khilji Dynasty'?
The famous 'Iron Pillar' at Mehrauli, Delhi, was built during the reign of:
In which year did the 'Battle of Plassey' take place?
Who was the first 'Governor-General of Bengal'?
The 'All India Muslim League' was founded in 1906 at which place?
Which Mughal Emperor shifted the Mughal capital from Agra to Delhi?
'Swaraj is my birthright and I shall have it' was the slogan of:
questions.options: {"A": "Mahatma Gandhi", "B": "Bal Gangadhar Tilak", "C": "Lala Lajpat Rai", "D": "Bipin Chandra Pal"}

questions.question_text: The 'Rowlatt Act' was passed in which year?
Which is the 'Largest Cold Desert' in the world?
The 'Tehri Dam' is located on which river?
Which Indian state is the largest producer of 'Cotton'?
The 'Ten Degree Channel' separates which of the following?
questions.options: {"A": "India and Sri Lanka", "B": "Andaman and Nicobar Islands", "C": "Lakshadweep and Maldives", "D": "North and South Korea"}

questions.question_text: Which layer of the atmosphere contains the 'Ionosphere'?
'Mount Etna', a famous active volcano, is located in which country?
Which river is known as the 'Lorrow of Bengal'?
Which Article of the Constitution deals with the 'Right to Freedom of Religion'?
The 'Council of Ministers' is collectively responsible to the:
Who was the first 'Woman Speaker' of the Lok Sabha?
'Anti-Defection Law' is contained in which Schedule of the Constitution?
What is the minimum age to be elected as a member of the 'Rajya Sabha'?
The 'Union List', 'State List', and 'Concurrent List' are part of which Schedule?
Who can preside over a 'Joint Sitting' of the Parliament?
questions.options: {"A": "President", "B": "Chairman of Rajya Sabha", "C": "Speaker of Lok Sabha", "D": "Prime Minister Section 6: Static GK & General Awareness"}

options_raw.label: D
options_raw.text: Prime Minister Section 6: Static GK & General Awareness

questions.question_text: 'Davis Cup' is associated with which sport?
Who was the first Indian to win a 'Nobel Prize in Literature'?
'Odissi' is the classical dance form of which state?
Where is the headquarters of the 'International Atomic Energy Agency' (IAEA)?
Which day is observed as 'National Voters' Day' in India?
The book 'An Era of Darkness' was written by:
'Yakshagana' is a traditional theater form of which state?
Which is the 'Deepest Port' in India?
questions.options: {"A": "Mumbai Port", "B": "Kandla Port", "C": "Visakhapatnam Port", "D": "Chennai Port General Intelligence & Reasoning"}

questions.question_text: Select the option that is related to the third term in the same way as the second term is related to the first term. Ammeter : Current :: Hygrometer : ?
Select the odd word out of the given alternatives.
Select the option that is related to the third number in the same way as the second number is related to the first number.
Four letter-clusters have been given, out of which three are alike in some manner and one is different. Select the odd one.
Select the option in which the words share the same relationship as that shared by the given pair of words.   Architect : House::
In a certain code language, 'PEAR' is written as '7519' and 'TOIL' is written as '2683'. How will 'LATE' be written in that code?
If 'CANDLE' is coded as 'EDPFNC', how will 'MODERN' be coded in that language?
In a code language, 'SKY' is coded as '82' and 'SEA' is coded as '56'. How will 'OCEAN' be coded in that language?
Select the number that can replace the question mark (?) in the following series. 11, 13, 17, 23, 31, 41, ?
Select the letter-cluster that can replace the question mark (?) in the following series. ADG, GJM, MPS, ?
Find the missing number in the following matrix.
Statements: I. All apples are red. II. Some red things are fruits. Conclusions: I. Some apples are fruits. II. No apple is a fruit.
questions.options: {"A": "Only conclusion I follows", "B": "Only conclusion II follows", "C": "Either conclusion I or II follows", "D": "Neither conclusion I nor II follows"}

options_raw.label: C
options_raw.text: Either conclusion I or II follows

options_raw.label: D
options_raw.text: Neither conclusion I nor II follows

questions.question_text: Which Venn diagram best represents the relationship between: Parents, Mothers, Fathers?
Pointing to a woman, Abhijit said, "Her granddaughter is the only daughter of my brother." How is the woman related to Abhijit?
A man starts walking towards the North. After walking 30m, he turns left and walks 40m. He then turns left and walks 30m. How far and in which direction is he from his starting point?
If '+' means '÷', '−' means '+', '×' means '−' and '÷' means '×', then what is the value of: 24+6÷2−15×10
The sum of the ages of a father and his son is 45 years. Five years ago, the product of their ages was four times the father's age at that time. The present age of the father is:
A square sheet of paper along the dotted line successively along the direction shown and its punched at middle. How would the paper look when unfolded?
A park has an average number of 420 visitors on Sunday and 120 on other days. The average number of visitors per day in a month of 30 days beginning with Sunday, is: 170 160 270 150
Select the correct mirror image of the given figure when the mirror is placed at MN as shown below.
Arrange the following words in a logical and meaningful order. Probation 2. Interview 3. Selection 4. Appointment 5. Advertisement 6. Application
In a row of 40 students, R is 11th from the right end and M is 14th from the left end. How many students are between R and M?
Which word CANNOT be formed from the letters of the word 'CONSOLIDATE'?
If 1st January 2024 was a Monday, what day of the week was 1st January 2025?
Select the option that is different from the others (Odd one out).
Arrange the following words in the order in which they appear in an English dictionary. Magnify 2. Magnetic 3. Moderate 4. Magical 5. Martial
From the given alternatives, select the word which CANNOT be formed using the letters of the given word: 'TRANSPORT'
From the given alternatives, select the word which CAN be formed using the letters of the given word: 'PREPARATION'
Which two numbers should be interchanged to make the given equation correct?
